refnamediv.refpurpose: Returns the value associated with the given key.

listitem.para: a string. The name of the option to get. All options which can be set with lowdisc_configure can be get with lowdisc_cget.
the value associated with the key.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: This command allows to get the current state of the object, which has been configured with the lowdisc_configure command.

refsection.title: Examples
